parameters.content:
## YouTube Tutorial to Auto Timestamp Generator + Community Post — WayinVideo Find Moments + GPT-4o-mini + Google Sheets

For YouTube creators, educators, and content teams who publish long tutorial or how-to videos and want to automatically generate chapter timestamps for their video description plus a Community post to promote it. Submit any YouTube tutorial URL via the form with your section search query. WayinVideo Find Moments API scans the full video and returns up to 15 matching section moments. The code node collects all moments, sorts them chronologically by timestamp, and builds a single formatted string for GPT. GPT-4o-mini completes three tasks in one call: generates clean chapter timestamps (with 0:00 Introduction first), writes a 3–4 sentence video description block, and writes a 100–150 word YouTube Community post with the full timestamp list embedded. Everything is saved as one row in Google Sheets — ready to copy and paste.

## How it works
- **1. Form — Video URL + Details** collects the video URL, title, channel name, category, target audience, and section search query
- **2. WayinVideo — Submit Find Moments** submits the URL and query to Find Moments API — limit 15, sorted chronologically
- **3. Wait — 90 Seconds** gives the API initial processing time
- **4. WayinVideo — Get Moments Results** polls the find-moments results endpoint
- **5. IF — Find Moments Complete?** checks for SUCCEEDED — if not, retries via 30-second wait
- **7. Code — Collect + Sort All Moments** sorts all clips by start time ascending, builds a single formatted moments string, and aggregates into one item for GPT
- **8. AI Agent — Generate Timestamps + Post** uses GPT-4o-mini to complete three tasks: formatted chapter list, video description block, and Community post
- **10. Code — Parse Timestamps Output** extracts all 5 labeled sections via regex
- **11. Google Sheets — Save Timestamp Library** appends one row per video with all timestamps, description, community post, and hashtags

## Set up steps
1. In **2. WayinVideo — Submit Find Moments** and **4. WayinVideo — Get Moments Results** — replace `YOUR_WAYINVIDEO_API_KEY`
2. In **9. OpenAI — GPT-4o-mini Model** — connect your OpenAI credential
3. In **11. Google Sheets — Save Timestamp Library** — connect your Google Sheets OAuth2 credential and replace `YOUR_GOOGLE_SHEET_ID`
4. Create a Google Sheet tab named Timestamp Library with columns: Video URL, Video Title, Channel Name, Video Category, Total Chapters, Total Moments Found, Video Duration (min), Formatted Timestamps, Video Description Block, Community Post, Hashtags, Generated On, Status

## Form Input
User submits video URL, title, channel name, category, target audience, and section search query. The search query directly drives which moments WayinVideo finds — the form includes example queries for different video types.

nodes.name: Section — Find Moments Submit and Poll

parameters.content:
## WayinVideo Find Moments Submit and Poll
Submits the video URL and section query to Find Moments API — limit 15, the highest in the series. Waits 90 seconds then polls until SUCCEEDED.

nodes.name: Section — Status Check and Retry Loop

parameters.content:
## Find Moments Status Check and Retry Loop
IF checks for SUCCEEDED status. TRUE proceeds to moment collection. FALSE waits 30 seconds and polls again. Loop continues until results are ready.

nodes.name: Section — Moment Collection, Sort, and AI Timestamp Writing

parameters.content:
## Moment Collection, Sort, and AI Timestamp Writing
Sorts all moments chronologically by start time and aggregates into one item. GPT-4o-mini completes three tasks in one call: chapter timestamps, video description block, and Community post with timestamps embedded.

nodes.name: Section — Timestamp Parse and Google Sheets Save

parameters.content:
## Timestamp Parse and Google Sheets Save
Regex extracts all 5 labeled sections. Google Sheets appends one row per video with formatted timestamps, description block, Community post, hashtags, and Ready status.

## ⚠️ Two Known Risks
1. Infinite loop — no poll counter. If WayinVideo returns FAILED or the URL is private, the workflow loops forever. Add a pollCount variable and stop after 15 retries.
2. Query quality — be specific. 'step by step section transition' works better than just 'steps'. You can run multiple queries by duplicating nodes 2–5.

values.placeholder: e.g. Complete SEO Tutorial for Beginners 2025 — Step by Step
e.g. SEO Tutorial, Python Course, Marketing Guide, Cooking Class
e.g. Beginners, digital marketers, developers, small business owners
e.g. step by step tutorial section / topic introduction and explanation / code example and demo

parameters.formDescription: Paste your YouTube tutorial or how-to video URL. AI will find all the key sections, generate formatted chapter timestamps, and write a YouTube Community post ready to publish.

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "video_url": "{{ $json['YouTube Video URL'] }}",
  "query": "{{ $json['Section Search Query'] }}",
  "project_name": "Timestamps — {{ $json['Video Title'] }}",
  "limit": 15,
  "enable_export": false,
  "target_lang": "en"
}

options.systemMessage:
=You are an expert YouTube content strategist who specializes in creating chapter timestamps and Community posts for tutorial videos.

WayinVideo AI has identified the key moments in a YouTube tutorial video. Your job is to:
1. Generate a clean formatted YouTube chapter timestamp list
2. Write a Video Description block with timestamps embedded
3. Write a YouTube Community post that promotes the video

---

## VIDEO DETAILS
- Video Title: {{ $json.videoTitle }}
- Channel: {{ $json.channelName }}
- Category: {{ $json.videoCategory }}
- Target Audience: {{ $json.targetAudience }}
- Video URL: {{ $json.videoUrl }}
- Total Moments Found: {{ $json.totalMoments }}
- Estimated Duration: {{ $json.totalMinutes }} minutes

---

## MOMENTS FOUND BY WAYINVIDEO (in chronological order)
{{ $json.momentsForGPT }}

---

## YOUR TASKS

### Task 1 — YouTube Chapter Timestamps
- Use the timestamps exactly as provided — do not change the MM:SS values
- Write clean, descriptive chapter titles — 3-6 words each
- First timestamp MUST be 0:00 — write 'Introduction' if there is no earlier moment
- Format: MM:SS Chapter Title (one per line)
- Sort chronologically

### Task 2 — Video Description Block
- Write 3-4 sentences introducing the video
- Include what the viewer will learn
- Mention the chapter timestamps are below
- Include the video URL at the end

### Task 3 — YouTube Community Post
- 100-150 words — engaging and friendly
- Start with a hook that makes people want to watch
- Mention 2-3 specific things they will learn from the video
- Include the full timestamp list inside the post
- End with a CTA to watch and comment
- 3-5 relevant hashtags

---

## OUTPUT FORMAT
Return in this exact structure:

FORMATTED_TIMESTAMPS:
0:00 Introduction
[MM:SS Chapter Title]
[MM:SS Chapter Title]
[Continue for all moments]

VIDEO_DESCRIPTION_BLOCK:
[Write 3-4 sentence description block here]

COMMUNITY_POST:
[Write full YouTube Community post here with timestamps embedded and hashtags at end]

HASHTAGS:
[5-8 relevant hashtags — lowercase — space separated]

TOTAL_CHAPTERS:
[Number only]

---

Now generate the timestamps, description block, and Community post:
